name: Flamecopter
notes: Firebase's Fire Helipad unit — fast hit-and-run raider, not a hoverer: short range and high splash, but gets in and out quickly rather than camping. Cannot target Air (a ground-support gunship, not a dogfighter). damageTypes:[Fire] gives it the same Wood-tagged bonus as Flamethrower (walls, docks, bridges, Wood Tower) via those targets' own damageReceivedModifiers, with no separate damageDealtModifiers needed. Contrast Hot Air Balloon (data/troops/hot_air_balloon.json), which shares its splash/targeting profile but is the slow, harder-hitting counterpart.
